titleStmt.title: SII 15.165: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 165. (B.K. Nos. 36 and 37 of 1927-28.) KAḶAKAPPANA-GUḌḌA, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone leaning against the wall at the left of entrance into the central shrine of Kāḷakāḷēśvara.
The inscription contains three dates which are as follows:
1. The 21st regnal year of the king, Vikrama, Kārttika-puṇṇami, Monday. This corresponds to 1220 A.D., October 12, Monday, f.d.t. °54.

2. Āṅgirasa, Kārttika-puṇṇami, Monday. The king is not mentioned, but evidently it has to be referred to Yādava Siṅghaṇa's reign. Thus it may be equated to 1212 A.D., November 10, the weekday being Saturday.

3. The 21st regnal year of the king, Pushya-amāvāsyā, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇasaṅkrānti. Pushya-amāvāsyā in this year occurred on 1220 A.D. December 26, which was Saturday. The said Saṅkramaṇa took place on the previous day.

On the first date, Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Vikramāditya, probably of the Sinda family, is said to have been ruling, when Sāyimagāvuṇḍa of Rājūr made a gift of land to the god Svayambhū Kaḷakaḷēśvara. Other gifts to the deity are also registered on this date. On the second date is recorded a gift of land to the deity by the six Gāvuṇḍas of Kārigitti and Leṅkas. On the last date is registered a gift of land to the deity by the Sixty-Four of Svayambhū Amṛitēśvara of Aṇṇigeṟe and the One Thousand. All the transactions must have been incised on stone on the last date.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ pratāpacakravartti siṁgaṇadēva
varṣada 21 neya vikrama saṁvatsarada kārttikada puṇnami sōmavāradaṁ
du śrīmanu mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ bhujabaṁbhi ma vikramādityadēvarasa
ra rājyābhyudayadalli śrīmatu rājūra muḍiyara kētagavuḍana supu
tra kuladīpaka samastaguṇasaṁpaṁnarppa sāyimagāUṁḍanu śrī kaḷakaḷēśvaredēvaRead saṁpannarappa
ra parvvada satrake bīEkhaṁḍiya keṟeyiṁ paḍuvalu gade�mattaru voṁdu 1 Ā dēvara śrī
kāryyake Uṁcaṁgeṟeya dāriyiṁ baḍagalu sōmanāthadēvara tōṁṭadiṁ mūḍalu
tōṁṭa mattaroṁdu 1 rājūra sthaḷada Uguramuṁnnūrvvaru Āynūṟanālvaruṁ sāsirvvaruṁ
sāyimagāvuṇḍanmukhyavāgi dēvara śrīkāryyakke cayitradalu Āḷiṁge E
leya bojagaralli hāga lekha . pavitradalu hāga lekha . Ayvattokkala seṭṭi
yaru Ā dēvare naṁdādīvigege yaṇnegāṇake Arddha solage śrīmatu sā
sirvvaru rājūra sthaḷada tōṁṭadalu koyda hēṟiṁge vīsamaṁ biṭṭaru . srīmatu ratnāga
raṁ Uṁcageṟeya sthaḻada Uguramūnūrvvaru Aynūṟa nālvaruṁ Eleya bo
jaṁgaruṁ rāsivāḻa Ayajēyanuṁ neredēkastharāgi kuḷḷirdu śrīsvayaṁbhu ka
ḻakahēśvaradēvara śrīkāryakke Āḻalu caitrakke hāga pavitrakke Aḻalu hāga le
kkana biṭṭaru . © Aṁgiresa saṁvatsarada kārttika puṇnami sōmavāradaṁdu kārigittiya
Aṟuvaru gāvuṇḍugaṟuṁ leṁkaru mukhyavāgi śrīsvayaṁbhu kaḻakaḷēśva
radēvara Āṁgabhōga satrake kōḷiya balana keṟe syehitavāgi mattaru nālku 4
mūlasthānadēvara maṭhadiṁ paḍuvalu haṁneraḍu keyya mane . © . svasti śrīmatu
yādavanārāyaṇaṁ pratāpacakravartti siṁgaṇadēvavarṣada . 21 neya vikra
ma saṁvatsarada puśya Ādivāra Amāvāsye vuttarāyaṇa saṁkramāṇadalli śrīsva
yaṁbhu kaḷakaḷēśvaradēvara Aṁgabhōgakka śrīsvayaṁbhu yaṇnigeṟe
ya Amritēśvara Aṟuvattanālvaruṁ sāsirvvaruṁ hiriyaru mukhya
vāgi diṁḍūra mūḍaṇa holada rājūra sīmeyiṁ paḍuvalu beṁḍiya
jōgana keṟeyiṁ baḍagalu dhārāpūrvvakavāgi koṭṭa mattaru nālu(ku) 4 . gāmēkāṁ
ratnikāmēkāṁ bhūmērapyēkamaṁgulaṁ haraṁnarakamāpnōti yāvadābhūtasaṁpla
vaṁ . [©] vikramasaṁvacharada kārttika sudha puṁṇnami sōmavāra saṁkramāṇadalli rā
jūra sthaḷada seṭṭikāṟaru muṁmuridaṁḍaṁgaḷu sāyimagāvuṁḍanu mukhyavāgi śrīkaḷakaḷē
svaradēvara dēvakāryyakke biṭṭa davasa byavahārakke hoṁge koṭṭalli vīsa 1 koṁḍḍalli vīsa [Oṁ] 1 du .
Digital edition of SII 15.165 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
